channel.title: Legendary on Factorio Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Legendary on Factorio Guide

item.title: Quality Module Upcycling Loop -- From Uncommon to Legendary Without Waste
item.description:
Quality upcycling is the most rewarding endgame system in Space Age, and the most misunderstood. The core loop is simple: craft items with

Quality
s, recycle failures back into raw materials, repeat with higher quality. But the math, the module choices, and the equipment priority order make the difference between a slow trickle and a legendary factory.

TL;DR: The base loop is: craft T1 item with 4x quality modules → recycle non-legendary outputs with 4x quality modules → repeat for T2/T3/T4 iterations. Each cycle gives roughly 1 legendary out of every 10,000 input normal items. This sounds terrible, but at scale (8+

Recycler
